CREATE VIEW IF NOT EXISTS business_info_and_verifier_info AS SELECT business_info.rbm_bot_id, business_info.name, business_info.logo_image_remote_url, business_info.logo_image_local_uri, business_info.description, business_info.color, business_info.verification_status, business_info.hero_image_remote_url, business_info.hero_image_local_uri, business_verifier_info.verifier_id, business_verifier_info.name AS verifier_name, business_verifier_info.description AS verifier_description, business_verifier_info.logo_image_remote_url AS verifier_logo_image_remote_url, business_verifier_info.logo_image_local_uri AS verifier_logo_image_local_uri FROM business_info LEFT JOIN business_verifier_info ON business_info.verifier_id = business_verifier_info.verifier_id;

CREATE VIEW IF NOT EXISTS business_info_and_verifier_info AS SELECT business_info.rbm_bot_id, business_info.name, business_info.logo_image_remote_url, business_info.logo_image_local_uri, business_info.description, business_info.color, business_info.verification_status, business_info.hero_image_remote_url, business_info.hero_image_local_uri, business_verifier_info.verifier_id, business_verifier_info.name AS verifier_name, business_verifier_info.description AS verifier_description, business_verifier_info.logo_image_remote_url AS verifier_logo_image_remote_url, business_verifier_info.logo_image_local_uri AS verifier_logo_image_local_uri FROM business_info LEFT JOIN business_verifier_info ON business_info.verifier_id = business_verifier_info.verifier_id;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS business_verifier_info ( verifier_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, description TEXT, logo_image_remote_url TEXT, logo_image_local_uri TEXT);
